name: proc_creation_win_malware_plugx_susp_exe_locations
raw_query: any where (process.executable:"*\\CamMute.exe" and (not (process.executable like~ ("*\\Lenovo\\Communication Utility\\*", "*\\Lenovo\\Communications Utility\\*")))) or (process.executable:"*\\chrome_frame_helper.exe" and (not process.executable:"*\\Google\\Chrome\\application\\*")) or (process.executable:"*\\dvcemumanager.exe" and (not process.executable:"*\\Microsoft Device Emulator\\*")) or (process.executable:"*\\Gadget.exe" and (not process.executable:"*\\Windows Media Player\\*")) or (process.executable:"*\\hcc.exe" and (not process.executable:"*\\HTML Help Workshop\\*")) or (process.executable:"*\\hkcmd.exe" and (not (process.executable like~ ("*\\System32\\*", "*\\SysNative\\*", "*\\SysWow64\\*")))) or (process.executable:"*\\Mc.exe" and (not (process.executable like~ ("*\\Microsoft Visual Studio*", "*\\Microsoft SDK*", "*\\Windows Kit*")))) or (process.executable:"*\\MsMpEng.exe" and (not (process.executable like~ ("*\\Microsoft Security Client\\*", "*\\Windows Defender\\*", "*\\AntiMalware\\*")))) or (process.executable:"*\\msseces.exe" and (not (process.executable like~ ("*\\Microsoft Security Center\\*", "*\\Microsoft Security Client\\*", "*\\Microsoft Security Essentials\\*")))) or (process.executable:"*\\OInfoP11.exe" and (not process.executable:"*\\Common Files\\Microsoft Shared\\*")) or (process.executable:"*\\OleView.exe" and (not (process.executable like~ ("*\\Microsoft Visual Studio*", "*\\Microsoft SDK*", "*\\Windows Kit*", "*\\Windows Resource Kit\\*")))) or (process.executable:"*\\rc.exe" and (not (process.executable like~ ("*\\Microsoft Visual Studio*", "*\\Microsoft SDK*", "*\\Windows Kit*", "*\\Windows Resource Kit\\*", "*\\Microsoft.NET\\*"))))
